description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-field` (T1-15). 4/6 libraries — layout wrapper for form fields.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-field/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, slot typing for label/input/helper/error, required indicator prop
2. Accessibility — label slot properly associated with slotted input (for/id or aria-labelledby), error slot has `role="alert"` or `aria-live`, required asterisk hidden from screen readers but visually present, axe-core pass
3. Tests — label association with various input types, error/help display, required indicator
4. Storybook — all slot combinations, error/help states, required variants
5. CSS — layout (label above/inline), `--hx-*` tokens, error state color, CSS parts (label, input-wrapper, helper, error)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (should be tiny — it's a layout wrapper)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable with slotted inputs

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-field/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-field — T1-15 antagonistic quality review
